DP.416.0000:
You need a Bicycle to go out on
Cycling Road!
DP.416.0001:
You need a Bicycle to go out on
Cycling Road!\f
DP.416.0002:
Learn how to shift gears, and you’ll
be able to ride anywhere.
DP.416.0003:
What’s a Bicycle without this?\f
You’ve got to have a Flag!
It’s a Pokémon Accessory!\f
DP.416.0004:
Go through Mt. Coronet from here,
and you can get to Hearthome City.\f
Hearthome is where they hold Pokémon
Contests.\f
You should dress up your Pokémon for
Contests with your Accessories.
